summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 5 new data management features added to Retail Book web app: Excel Upload/Import, Excel Export, Database Backup/Restore, Mobile-optimized layout, and Barcode scanner integration. All backend APIs (5/5 new endpoints) working perfectly. Frontend Data Manager page fully functional with 3 tabs. Mobile layout responsive and working correctly. Barcode scanner button renders but has expected camera access limitations in headless browser environment.

integration_issues.issue: html5-qrcode library throws errors in headless browser environment due to camera access restrictions
integration_issues.note: Expected behavior - barcode scanner requires HTTPS + camera permissions. Button renders correctly and modal opens, but camera functionality needs real device testing

passed_tests: All 5 new backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Database stats (GET /api/db/stats) - returns items_count: 267, advances_count: 10
Excel export (GET /api/export/excel) - generates valid .xlsx file (44,244 bytes)
Database backup (GET /api/backup) - creates valid JSON backup (364,185 bytes) with items and advances arrays
Database restore (POST /api/restore) - accepts JSON file and restores 266 items, 9 advances
Excel import (POST /api/import/excel?mode=append) - accepts .xlsx file and imports 1 item, 1 advance
Frontend: Data Manager page loads at /data with 3 tabs (Import, Export, Backup)
Frontend: Database stats display correctly (267 items, 10 advances)
Frontend: Import tab shows drag-and-drop zone and import mode radio buttons (Replace/Append)
Frontend: Export tab shows download Excel button with correct URL (/api/export/excel)
Frontend: Backup tab shows backup download button (/api/backup) and restore drop zone
Frontend: Sidebar shows Data Manager nav item below the divider
Frontend: New Bill page has barcode scanner button (camera icon) next to barcode input
Frontend: Barcode scanner button opens modal with header and close button
Frontend: Mobile layout - sidebar toggle button visible and functional on mobile (390px width)
Frontend: Mobile layout - sidebar opens/closes correctly with overlay
Frontend: Mobile layout - content has proper padding on small screens
Frontend: Tablet layout (768px) renders correctly with responsive design
Frontend: All existing pages still work (Dashboard loads with data, navigation works)
Frontend: Navigation between Dashboard, Search, Reports, Data Manager works correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (38/38 tests passed including 5 new data management feature tests)
success_percentage.frontend: 98% (all core functionality working, barcode scanner has expected camera access limitations in headless environment)
